name: Requin (SS-481)
events: 3 Jun 1945 USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island from Portsmouth New Hampshire for torpedo trials.
6 Jun 1945 With her torpedo trials completed, USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN), arrived at New London, Connecticut.
20 Jun 1945 USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
29 Jun 1945 USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New London, Connecticut.
17 Jul 1945 USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
30 Jul 1945 USS Requin (Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) arrived at Pearl Harbor from the Panama Canal Zone.
